name: PT Putra Rajawali Kencana Tbk
summary: PT Putra Rajawali Kencana Tbk operates as an intra logistic and multimode company in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides transportation management services, including the business of sending and/or packing of goods in large volumes through railroad, land, sea, and air transportation. It also offers multimodal transportation services comprising the transportation of goods using various modes of transportation. In addition, the company provides additional services in the form of freight forwarding, warehousing, cargo consolidation, cargo space, and customs clearance for multimodal transportation; rents and leases cars, buses, and trucks without option rights; and leases cars, trucks, and tow trucks without operational rights. Further, it trades in used cars consisting of special cars, such as ambulances, caravans, microbus, fire engines, etc.; and lorries, trailers, semi-trailers, and various other motorized transport vehicles. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.
